title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 168.530 - Reimbursement by department for coordinator, when
text:
168.530.  Reimbursement by department for coordinator, when. — The department of elementary and secondary education shall not reimburse a school district for more than one A+ program coordinator per one thousand two hundred fifty students; however a school with up to one thousand five hundred students shall be reimbursed for only one A+ program coordinator.
(L. 2004 S.B. 968 and S.B. 969 § 1)
